creator: bokutin@bokut.in
text:
Thank you for your review.

What I am sending is what I have been updating in local repository for several years already.

Even if I quit using it, I will update it for a while.

However, because it is used in multiple productions, it seems that I can not quit. ^ ^;;

Perl has another very good tool such as cpanminus.
However, the use of pkg -j etc is convenient and ultra fast, so I like the package.
